title: Surface protector coating
abstract: The present invention generally relates to polymeric surface coatings, and in particular polymeric stainless steel coatings which are readily peelable and provide a surface protection function from contamination and physical scratching.
claims: Claims CLAIMS: 1. A peelable polymer coating composition comprising a mixture of at least one low Tg water-dispersed polyurethane (low Tg PU) and at least one high Tg water-dispersed polyurethane (high Tg PU), where in the low Tg PU has a low Tg PU solids content of about 30% to about 50% by weight and wherein the high Tg PU has a high Tg PU solids content of about 30% to about 50% by weight, and wherein the ratio of the low Tg PU : high Tg PU in the coating composition ranges from about 10:90 %(w/w) to about 90: 10 %(w/w). 2. A peelable polymer coating composition according to claim 1 wherein the at least one low Tg PU has a Tg between -5Â° - 10Â°C. 3. A peelable polymer coating composition according to claim 1 or claim 2 wherein the at least one high Tg PU has a Tg between 20Â° - 40Â°C. 4. A peelable polymer coating composition according to any one of claims 1 to 3, further comprising at least one coalescing agent. 5. A peelable coating composition according to any one of claims 1 to 4, wherein the composition is applied to a stainless steel surface. 6. A peelable polymer coating composition according to any one of claims 1 to 5, further comprising at least one defoamer, at least one leveling agent and at least one thickener. 7. A peelable polymer coating composition according to any one of claims 1 to 6 wherein the composition further comprises a pH indicator compound. 8. A peelable polymer coating composition according to any one of claims 1 to 7, wherein the coating composition has a peel strength of between 1-10 N/inch. 9. A peelable polymer coating composition according to any one of claims 1 to 8, wherein the coating composition has a ratio of high Tg PU : low Tg PU in the range of from about 50:50% (w/w) to about 90: 10% (w/w). 10. A peelable polymer coating composition according to any one of claims 1 to 8, wherein the coating composition has a ratio of high Tg PU : low Tg PU in the range of from about 10:90% (w/w) to about 50:50% (w/w). 11. A stainless steel based product wherein at least a portion of the product has been coated with a composition according to any one of claims 1 to 10.
